title: teucrium trifoliatum
intro: Teucrium trifoliatum, also known as Trifoliate Germander, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal supplements and topical creams to leverage its medicinal properties.
